title: subworkflow - experimental aws networking error rate spike mitigation
description:
Experimental outage prevention subworkflow for aws-networking / error-rate-spike-mitigation.

Sources considered: public engineering discussions, Stack Overflow trend tags, ServiceNow automation operations themes, and common enterprise SRE incident classes. Gartner/Forrester insights are represented as generalized resilience themes due publication access boundaries.

This workflow enforces execute -> wait -> verify and avoids fire-and-forget behavior.
guide:
## 🧪 Experimental Outage-Prevention Subworkflow

This experimental subworkflow targets a critical outage-prevention scenario synthesized from engineering forum patterns and automation operations use cases.

### 🎯 Scenario
- Context: **aws-networking**
- Remediation focus: **error-rate-spike-mitigation**
- Primary action: **dynatrace.automations:run-javascript**

### 🧠 Reliability Pattern
- ▶️ Execute primary remediation action
- ⏳ Wait for action stabilization
- ✅ Verify action completion and fail on unsuccessful statuses

### 🔮 Forecasting
- ℹ️ Forecasting pre-check not required for this scenario.

### 🔧 Notes
- This is an experimental template and may require environment-specific parameter tuning.
- No fire-and-forget behavior is allowed; wait and check tasks are always present.

wait-for-action.name: wait-for-action
wait-for-action.description: Wait for action stabilization and detect in-progress states.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Verify final action result and fail on bad terminal status.
